top_stories.title: MDClone Launches ADAMS Copilot, GenAI-Powered Healthcare Data Assistant
top_stories.description: ADAMS Copilot enables healthcare organizations to move from question to validated insight—faster, safer, and at scale. MDClone, a healthcare technology company enabling secure, self-service exploration of complex healthcare data, today announced the launch of ADAMS Copilot, its AI-powered healthcare data assistant, designed to transform how clinical, operational, quality, and research... The post MDClone Launches ADAMS Copilot, GenAI-Powered Healthcare Data Assistant first appeared on AI-Tech...

top_stories.title: Now Live: The World’s Most Powerful AI Factory for Pharmaceutical Discovery and Development
top_stories.description: Lilly this week launched the most powerful AI factory wholly owned and operated by a pharmaceutical company to help its teams make meaningful medical advancements faster, more accurately and at unprecedented scale. Dubbed LillyPod, it’s the world’s first NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD with DGX B300 systems.
top_stories.author: Rory Kelleher
top_stories.content: Lilly this week launched the most powerful AI factory wholly owned and operated by a pharmaceutical company to help its teams make meaningful medical advancements faster, more accurately and at unprecedented scale. Dubbed LillyPod, it’s the world’s first NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD with DGX B300 systems.

top_stories.title: A Coding Guide to Build a Complete Single Cell RNA Sequencing Analysis Pipeline Using Scanpy for Clustering Visualization and Cell Type Annotation
top_stories.description: In this tutorial, we build a complete pipeline for single-cell RNA sequencing analysis using Scanpy. We start by installing the required libraries and loading the PBMC 3k dataset, then perform quality control, filtering, and normalization to prepare the data for downstream analysis. top_stories.title: City Detect, which uses AI to help cities stay safe and clean, raises $13M Series A
top_stories.description: City Detect, a company that helps local governments prevent urban decay, is in at least 17 cities so far, including Dallas and Miami.
top_stories.author: Dominic-Madori Davis
top_stories.content: City Detect, a company that helps local governments prevent urban decay, is in at least 17 cities so far, including Dallas and Miami.
